overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The journey transitions from an open plaza beneath an elevated highway, across a busy intersection with futuristic vehicles, through covered commercial walkways with holographic advertisements, and finally into a bustling indoor market area with food stalls.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza toward the intersection ahead

tall palm tree in circular concrete planter
illuminated storefront signs with green and white lighting
massive concrete overpass with support pillars

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a futuristic urban plaza at night, dominated by a massive green residential tower ahead. A palm tree stands to the right while neon-lit shops line the left side. The character walks forward on wet asphalt beneath an elevated highway structure.

silver sedan waiting at the traffic light

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a busy intersection with red and yellow painted crosswalk lines. A police car with NCPD markings drives past on the left, while other futuristic vehicles navigate the intersection. The elevated highway structure remains visible overhead as the character moves into the street.

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered commercial area passing holographic advertisements

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered commercial walkway beneath the elevated highway. Bright neon signs including a prominent green CTECH store illuminate the left side, while large digital billboards display advertisements on the right. The ground changes to tiled pavement as the character moves deeper into the covered area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with concrete seating and planter boxes

events.description: passing by concrete benches and large planter boxes with dense bushes

agents.ego_description: walking past seating areas and greenery under the elevated structure

notable_agents.action: person in colorful jacket and shorts walking toward the camera

entered.detail: long concrete seating benches with yellow painted bases
large rectangular planters with dense green bushes and foliage

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues under the massive concrete overpass, now featuring concrete benches and planter boxes with dense vegetation on the right. The area is quieter with fewer pedestrians. A person in colorful clothing walks toward the camera as the character proceeds toward a market area visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor market hall with food stalls and scattered litter

events.description: enters covered market area with food stalls and vendors
passing produce stalls with crates of goods and a person sitting on a bench

agents.ego_description: walking through the busy market corridor with vendors and shoppers

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered market area transitioning from the open walkway. Food stalls line the left side with crates of produce, while the floor is littered with papers and debris. A vending machine glows on the right, and several people are visible including a vendor and a person seated on a bench. The ceiling becomes fully enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market corridor with closed shutters approaching bright exit

events.description: approaching bright exit at end of dark market corridor with increasing light levels

agents.ego_description: continuing through the market corridor toward the bright exit visible ahead

entered.detail: long overhead fluorescent lighting fixtures illuminating the corridor
metal roll-down shutters covering closed storefronts
brightly lit exit opening showing outdoor light at end of corridor

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves deeper into the covered market corridor, passing closed shops with metal shutters. The floor remains littered with cardboard and trash. Overhead fluorescent tubes provide harsh lighting as the character approaches a bright exit opening at the far end of the corridor, suggesting a transition back to outdoor space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit futuristic city, transitioning from an open urban plaza into a dense, enclosed market corridor. It begins on wet asphalt beneath an elevated highway, moving past a massive green residential tower and neon shops toward a busy intersection where NCPD police cars and futuristic vehicles navigate red and yellow crosswalks. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts into a covered commercial walkway with tiled pavement, passing bright CTECH signs and digital billboards before gliding past concrete benches and lush planter boxes. The scene then narrows as the character enters a covered market area, where the open air is replaced by a fully enclosed ceiling and the polished streets give way to floors littered with debris and produce crates. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the corridor past closed metal shutters under harsh fluorescent lighting, heading toward a bright exit opening at the far end.
